summary: LendPay is an Initia MiniMove appchain for agent-guided credit across Initia apps. It combines .init identity, AI-assisted underwriting, live viral drop usage, and installment repayment in one internal flow.
notes: Public URLs in this submission are public pre-production demo deployments, not a final production release
Native rollup asset: LEND (internal base denom: ulend)
Viral drop proof tx hash on lendpay-4: 578AB95B519EE25A7E60D52E0A876C5DB81D4B658871BD066938F4E4863A4286
Core flow request tx hash on lendpay-4: 48A044189CC75E1877E455D208E2F22BD6706DDF25DF410D62144D4DB9E3D5A2
Bridge module upgrade tx on lendpay-4: A36F31E75969F9D285EEA503F6046D065AA3A0B56561B5E04F2EB9DAB8D251FA
Bridge route register tx on lendpay-4: A2D0DF04150D326D951A0EE13AA4600EBD22D6F03C62F6440DB5913B05A54C53
Verified native integrations: InterwovenKit, Initia Usernames, temporary auto-sign session UX, MiniMove rollup execution, and an Interwoven Bridge surface backed by onchain route metadata
Current live destination is the internal viral_drop flow used for the demo and repayment loop
Current bridge route metadata is onchain, but final MiniEVM sell readiness still depends on the official ulend mapping
